description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was proceeding straight on Harrison St. in San Francisco, Ca, when a passenger vehicle turning left from 14th 
St. on to Harrison St. struck the rear of the Zoox vehicle damaging the sensors. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
